dealSummary: Quantum computing startup Atom Computing raised a $100 million Series C led by Third Point Ventures and agreed to receive $100 million from the US Department of Commerce.
leadInvestors: Third Point Ventures, agreed to receive $100 million from the US Department of Commerce

dealSummary: Data center infrastructure company Hydra Host received a $100 million Series A led by Kindred Ventures.
AttoTude, which specializes in interconnect technology for AI infrastructure, secured a $52 million Series C led by The Westly Group.
Bland, a San Francisco-based voice AI startup, raised a $50 million Series C led by Dell Technologies Capital.
Copia Automation, the developer of a code management platform for the industrials sector, raised a $26 million round led by AE Ventures and Squadra Ventures.
Rejoni, a biotech startup developing therapies for uterine health, secured a $25 million round from investors including ClavystBio, Amed Ventures and Ascension Ventures.
Foundation Alloy, which specializes in metal alloy engineering, received a $22 million Series A led by Voyager Ventures.
Paris-based wellness apps publisher Rocapine secured a $13 million Series A led by Educapital.
Berlin-based audit automation startup Cortea raised a €12 million seed investment led by Dawn Capital.
Swedish legal tech specialist Lightbringer received a $10 million Series A led by 6 Degrees Capital and Newion.
Causa Prima, a Munich-based startup building a European agent-to-agent network for B2B finance, raised a $10 million pre-seed investment led by Creandum.
